function S(S)return W[S-(420701-418829)]end for S,B in ipairs({{-733167+733168,311493-309546},{-10638+10639;-713188-(-714067)},{-649397-(-650277),-871799+873746}})do while B[834034-834033]<B[-458396-(-458398)]do
